name: Filesystem
description: Secure file operations with configurable access controls

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read the complete contents of a file from the file system

path.description: Path to the file to read

tools.name: read_multiple_files
tools.description: Read the contents of multiple files simultaneously

paths.description: List of file paths to read

tools.name: write_file
tools.description: Create a new file or overwrite an existing file with new contents

path.description: Path to the file to write

content.description: Content to write to the file

tools.name: edit_file
tools.description: Make line-based edits to a text file using search and replace

path.description: Path to the file to edit

edits.description: List of edit operations to apply

tools.name: create_directory
tools.description: Create a new directory or ensure a directory exists

path.description: Path of the directory to create

tools.name: list_directory
tools.description: List files and directories in a given path

path.description: Path of the directory to list

tools.name: move_file
tools.description: Move or rename files and directories

tools.name: search_files
tools.description: Recursively search for files and directories matching a pattern

tools.name: get_file_info
tools.description: Retrieve metadata about a file or directory

path.description: Path to the file or directory

tools.name: list_allowed_directories
tools.description: Returns the list of directories the server is allowed to access
